overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit covered transit plaza in Night City. The character walks through the futuristic commercial area with teal and magenta lighting, observes traffic from an elevated overlook, and ascends to an upper level with panoramic views of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit plaza with teal neon lighting

events.description: character approaches the railing overlooking the street below

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered transit plaza toward the elevated overlook

entered.detail: cylindrical structure covered in colorful advertisements and posters
long benches with glowing teal lighting underneath
rectangular panels emitting bright cyan-teal illumination
metal railing marking the edge of the elevated plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered transit plaza with distinctive teal neon lighting. The space features modern benches and a circular kiosk with posters. The camera approaches a railing that overlooks a street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of busy urban intersection

events.description: character reaches the railing and looks down at the street intersection below
vehicles move through the intersection as traffic lights change

agents.ego_description: leaning on the railing observing the traffic and neon-lit street below

entered.detail: multi-lane road with crosswalks visible through the railing
vertical traffic signals showing red and green lights
tall structures with large glowing advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the railing overlooking a busy cyberpunk street intersection. Vehicles move through the crosswalks below while neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the distant buildings. The camera pans to show the traffic flow before the character steps back.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with shops and holographic ads

events.description: character walks past the Tech House shop with bright red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza past neon-lit shops and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: character with purple hair and white jacket walking ahead through the plaza

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading TECH HOUSE above a shop entrance
vertical display with colorful character artwork and neon green border
large horizontal screen showing animated advertisements
futuristic door frame with purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a commercial corridor lined with shops and bright neon signage. Other pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The Tech House shop with its distinctive red neon sign and various holographic billboards dominate the visual field.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor leading to upper level stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the escalator stairs to the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and ascending the illuminated escalator stairs

entered.detail: green neon sign reading JOE'S on the wall
moving staircase with metal steps and side lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a darker corridor with the green Joe's neon sign visible. The space transitions to an escalator which the character ascends, moving toward an upper level with views of the city opening up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: character emerges onto upper level with open view of the neon-lit cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level overlook admiring the panoramic views of the cyberpunk city

entered.detail: red safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
dense cluster of skyscrapers with multicolored neon lights and holograms
street intersection visible from above with moving traffic and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper level walkway with a red railing, offering panoramic views of the sprawling cyberpunk city below. The scene features dense neon signage, holographic billboards, and the glow of traffic moving through the streets beneath the elevated platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit transit plaza that gradually ascends to a panoramic overlook of the sprawling cyberpunk city. It begins by following the character through a covered plaza bathed in teal neon, passing modern benches and a circular kiosk before approaching a railing. As the camera reaches the edge, the view opens up to a busy street intersection filled with moving vehicles and holographic advertisements, before the character steps back to enter a commercial corridor. The scene then shifts through a vibrant shopping area dominated by the red neon of a Tech House shop and various pedestrians, eventually transitioning into a darker corridor marked by a green neon sign. Finally, the camera follows the character up an escalator to an upper-level walkway with a red railing, where the environment expands into a wide vista of dense signage and glowing traffic far below.
